scripts.build:db-writer: mkdir -p .locagens-dev/go-cache && GOCACHE="$PWD/.locagens-dev/go-cache" go -C apps/db-writer build -o dist/db-writer .
scripts.dist: pnpm run build:db-writer && pnpm --filter @locagens/shared build && pnpm --filter @locagens/web build && pnpm --filter @locagens/api run build:bundle && pnpm --filter @locagens/desktop run dist
